pageContext.name: Luke Skywalker™ Hand Magnet
pageContext.description: Regal Robot is proud to present the newest creation in their Separation Collection, the Luke Skywalker™ Hand Magnet!  This magnetic mini sculpture is based on Luke Skywalker's Hand from Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back™… and perhaps the most iconic scene of the entire original trilogy!  Sculpted for Regal Robot by Ralph Sutter and designed, prototyped, and produced in the USA, each magnet is cast in solid resin and hand-painted by Regal Robot's artists in their New York studio with distinctive faux finishes. They ship ready to display.  Add this great new magnet to your collection, home, office, man-cave, or fridge!
